info.title: dotnet-aws
info.description: Opinionated tooling that simplifies deployment of .NET applications with minimum AWS knowledge.

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: ArgumentExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: OptionExtensions.Parse, OK: SymbolExtensions.Parse, OK: Parser.Parse, OK: ParserExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParseResultExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParseResultExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ModelBindingCommandHandler.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: The AWS .NET deployment tool for deploying .NET applications on AWS.

options.name: version
options.description: Show version information

options.name: help
options.description: Show help and usage information

commands.name: deploy
commands.description: Inspect, build, and deploy the .NET project to AWS using the recommended AWS service.

options.name: profile
options.description: AWS credential profile used to make calls to AWS.

options.name: region
options.description: AWS region to deploy the application to. For example, us-west-2.

options.name: project-path
options.description: Path to the project to deploy.

options.name: application-name
options.description: Name of the cloud application. If you choose to deploy via CloudFormation, this name will be used to identify the CloudFormation stack.

options.name: apply
options.description: Path to the deployment settings file to be applied.

options.name: diagnostics
options.description: Enable diagnostic output.

options.name: silent
options.description: Disable interactivity to execute commands without any prompts for user input.

options.name: deployment-project
options.description: The absolute or relative path of the CDK project that will be used for deployment

commands.name: deployment-project
commands.description: Save the deployment project inside a user provided directory path.

options.name: help
options.description: Show help and usage information

commands.name: generate
commands.description: Save the deployment project inside a user provided directory path without proceeding with a deployment

options.name: output
options.description: Directory path in which the CDK deployment project will be saved.

options.name: diagnostics
options.description: Enable diagnostic output.

options.name: project-path
options.description: Path to the project to deploy.

options.name: project-display-name
options.description: The name of the deployment project that will be displayed in the list of available deployment options.

options.name: help
options.description: Show help and usage information

commands.name: server-mode
commands.description: Launches the tool in a server mode for IDEs like Visual Studio to integrate with.

options.name: port
options.description: Port the server mode will listen to.

options.name: parent-pid
options.description: The ID of the process that is launching server mode. Server mode will exit when the parent pid terminates.

options.name: unsecure-mode
options.description: If set the cli uses an unsecure mode without encryption.

options.description: Enable diagnostic output.
